title: Add InnerLift Wellness Logo

requirements.text: Display the generated InnerLift Wellness logo image (innerlift-logo.dim_300x80.png) in the Navigation component as the site brand logo, replacing any existing logo or text-only brand mark.
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image appears in the top navigation bar on all pages
The logo links back to the homepage (/)
The logo is displayed at an appropriate size and does not overflow the navigation bar
The logo also appears in the Footer component's brand section

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Logo image must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/
nonGoals: Rebuilding the full InnerLift Wellness site from scratch in this request
Changing navigation structure or adding new pages

required: InnerLift Wellness brand logo featuring a stylized upward-lift or lotus/leaf motif in soft sage green and warm teal tones, with clean modern sans-serif wordmark 'InnerLift Wellness' beside the icon (innerlift-logo.dim_300x80.png)
InnerLift Wellness favicon — minimal icon version of the logo mark only, no text, on transparent background (innerlift-favicon.dim_64x64.png)
